notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling reaches on a throwing error by third baseman José Caballero. Zach McKinstry scores. James Outman to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Cody Bellinger. Matt Vierling to 3rd. Dillon Dingler to 2nd.
